# Claude Code prompt — [5A] Tendering (PR C) — floating bulk editor for Assumptions / Exclusions (Alt+A)

*Paste below the line. Generated by Cowork, 2026-05-26.*

---

You are working on `GH-Mantova/ProjectOperations`. Read `CLAUDE.md` and follow it.

## Background

Estimators want a fast way to bulk-enter project-specific Assumptions +
Exclusions without flipping to the Quote tab. A floating editor accessible
via keyboard shortcut and a button on the tender detail page lets them
capture rapidly while working in Overview or Scope of Works. Writes through
to the same `TenderAssumption[]` / `TenderExclusion[]` data the Quote tab
uses — no duplicate state.

## Phase 0

- `git fetch origin`; branch off `main`: `feat/floating-assumptions-exclusions-editor`.

## Component

New file `apps/web/src/pages/tendering/AssumptionsExclusionsFloatingEditor.tsx`.

### Position + size

- Anchored to the **top-right** of the viewport (one corner always at fixed
  top-right; the bottom-left corner is the resize handle).
- Default size ~ 520 × 460 px (fits two columns comfortably).
- Resizable via CSS `resize: both` on the panel container OR a custom
  bottom-left drag handle, whichever fits the existing app patterns.
- Size persisted per user in `localStorage` key
  `tendering.assumptionsExclusionsEditor.size` as JSON `{ width, height }`.
- Position is NEVER persisted — always re-anchors to top-right on open.
- Z-index sits above the Tendering Assistant bubble (which is bottom-right
  anchored — no overlap).

### Contents

Two-column layout: **Assumptions** | **Exclusions**.

Each column:
- Title header.
- List of existing entries — each row has an editable text input + `×` delete
  button.
- "+ Add row" affordance at the bottom of the list. Clicking it (or pressing
  Enter while focused in the last row) adds an empty row and moves focus.
- Existing-row edits save **on blur** via `PATCH`.
- New-row entries save **on blur** (or Enter) via `POST`; "+ Add row" then
  reappears beneath the just-saved row, ready for the next.

Save semantics: **immediate on blur** (same as the inline Quote-tab editor —
write to `TenderAssumption` / `TenderExclusion` via existing endpoints; no
"Apply" / "Save" button).

`×` delete = optimistic UI + `DELETE` request; revert on failure.

## Trigger

- **Button** — small floating button (or top-right corner FAB style) on the
  tender detail page. Visible on **Overview** and **Scope of Works** tabs.
  **Hidden on Quote** tab (assumptions/exclusions are already inline there).
- **Keyboard shortcut** — `Alt+A` toggles the panel open/closed. Active on
  Overview + SoW. **Inactive on Quote**.
- Both trigger paths open the same panel instance.

## Endpoints

Use the existing endpoints — no new API needed if these exist; otherwise add
them to mirror the inline Quote-tab editor's data path:
- `GET /tenders/:id/assumptions`
- `POST /tenders/:id/assumptions`
- `PATCH /tenders/:id/assumptions/:assumptionId`
- `DELETE /tenders/:id/assumptions/:assumptionId`
- Same shape for `/exclusions`.

## Co-existence with the Tendering Assistant

The Assistant's `propose_quote_content` tool can already propose
assumptions/exclusions (per roadmap §5A.1 PR E). The floating editor is the
manual bulk-entry alternative. Both write to the same data — no conflict;
the panel refetches on focus and reflects Assistant-added entries.

## Tests

- Component: add row → input appears + focused; blur saves; "+ Add row" relocates.
- Component: edit existing entry on blur → PATCH fires; updated entry displayed.
- Component: delete row → row disappears + DELETE fires.
- Keyboard: `Alt+A` on Overview opens; `Alt+A` on Quote tab is a no-op.
- Trigger button: visible on Overview + SoW; hidden on Quote.
- `localStorage`: resize persists; reload restores size; position always
  top-right.
- §6 pre-PR CI checklist green.

- Title: `[5A] Tendering — floating bulk editor for Assumptions / Exclusions (Alt+A)`
- Body: spec, file list, no new env vars / migrations.
- Reviewer `GH-Mantova`.
- **Do NOT auto-merge.** Owner verifies the `Alt+A` flow, the button on
  Overview / SoW (but not Quote), resize persistence.

## Scope

Only the floating editor component + trigger wiring. Do not change the existing
Quote-tab inline editor or any other surface.
